changes.value:
builtin/skills/test-loop/SKILL.md:3

The frontmatter description says "continuously run tests, create failure cards, and implement fixes". The phrase "implement fixes" overstates what the skill controls — it delegates to `/implement` which picks up whatever card is next, not specifically fix cards. This works in practice (because the only cards on the board should be test-failure cards in this context), but the description could mislead users who have a mixed board.

Suggestion: Change to "continuously run tests, create failure cards, and fix failures until the suite is fully green"."
NIT: test-loop description uses "implement fixes" but /implement is a general-purpose card picker, not a fix-specific skill
